description: The resource schema for AWSLogs QueryDefinition

LogGroup.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 512  
Pattern: [\.\-_/#A-Za-z0-9]+  
Update requires: No interruption

QueryParameter.description: This structure defines a query parameter for a saved CloudWatch Logs Insights query definition. Query parameters are supported only for Logs Insights QL queries. They are placeholder variables that you can reference in a query string using the {{parameterName}} syntax. Each parameter can include a default value and a description.

Name.description: The name of the query parameter. A query parameter name must start with a letter or underscore, and contain only letters, digits, and underscores.
Name.markdownDescription:
The name of the query parameter. A query parameter name must start with a letter or underscore, and contain only letters, digits, and underscores.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 128  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$  
Update requires: No interruption

DefaultValue.description: The default value to use for this query parameter if no value is supplied at execution time.
DefaultValue.markdownDescription:
The default value to use for this query parameter if no value is supplied at execution time.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 1024  
Update requires: No interruption

Description.description: A description of the query parameter that explains its purpose or expected values.
Description.markdownDescription:
A description of the query parameter that explains its purpose or expected values.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 512  
Update requires: No interruption

QueryParameter.markdownDescription:
This structure defines a query parameter for a saved CloudWatch Logs Insights query definition. Query parameters are supported only for Logs Insights QL queries. They are placeholder variables that you can reference in a query string using the {{parameterName}} syntax. Each parameter can include a default value and a description.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

Name.description: A name for the saved query definition
Name.markdownDescription:
A name for the saved query definition

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 255  
Update requires: No interruption

QueryString.description: The query string to use for this definition
QueryString.markdownDescription:
The query string to use for this definition

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 10000  
Update requires: No interruption

LogGroupNames.description: Optionally define specific log groups as part of your query definition

items.markdownDescription:
LogGroup name

---

Required: No  
Type:   
Update requires: No interruption

LogGroupNames.markdownDescription:
Optionally define specific log groups as part of your query definition

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

QueryDefinitionId.description: Unique identifier of a query definition
QueryDefinitionId.markdownDescription:
Unique identifier of a query definition

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

QueryLanguage.description: Query language of the query string. Possible values are CWLI, SQL, PPL, with CWLI being the default.
QueryLanguage.markdownDescription:
Query language of the query string. Possible values are CWLI, SQL, PPL, with CWLI being the default.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: CWLI | SQL | PPL  
Update requires: No interruption

Parameters.description: Use this parameter to include specific query parameters as part of your query definition. Query parameters are supported only for Logs Insights QL queries. Query parameters allow you to use placeholder variables in your query string that are substituted with values at execution time. Use the {{parameterName}} syntax in your query string to reference a parameter.
Parameters.markdownDescription:
Use this parameter to include specific query parameters as part of your query definition. Query parameters are supported only for Logs Insights QL queries. Query parameters allow you to use placeholder variables in your query string that are substituted with values at execution time. Use the {{parameterName}} syntax in your query string to reference a parameter.

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

QueryDefinitionId.description: Unique identifier of a query definition
QueryDefinitionId.markdownDescription:
Unique identifier of a query definition

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
